query: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(publishedAt, '%Y-%m') as period, COUNT(*) as count FROM signals GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(publishedAt, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY period DESC LIMIT 30; SELECT signal_count, COUNT(*) as periods FROM index_history GROUP BY signal_count ORDER BY signal_count;
